_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 10 efsa_status values in efsa_openfoodtox_reference.json. Lean schema (internal taxonomy ID). NOTE: 3 near-duplicates flagged for clinician consolidation in v1.1: approved vs approved_with_restrictions vs approved_restricted — semantically overlapping; consolidating to approved + approved_with_restrictions would clean the vocab.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for EFSA OpenFoodTox status labels. Surfaced in tap-to-explain on EU regulatory cards.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/efsa_openfoodtox_reference.json `efsa_status` field (91 substances; live: approved=64, banned_eu=7, contaminant_monitored=6, approved_with_restrictions=4, approved_restricted=2, restricted_eu=2, food_ingredient=2, under_review=2, extraction_solvent=1, not_authorised_eu=1).
_metadata.v1_1_followup: Consolidate approved + approved_with_restrictions + approved_restricted into 2 IDs after clinician review.

efsa_statuses.name: Approved (EFSA)
efsa_statuses.notes: Substance has been evaluated by EFSA and approved for use in the EU without significant restrictions.

efsa_statuses.name: Approved with restrictions
efsa_statuses.notes: Substance is approved by EFSA but with explicit dose, age-group, or use-case limitations spelled out in the assessment.

efsa_statuses.name: Approved (restricted)
efsa_statuses.notes: Variant of approved_with_restrictions used for specific regulatory categories. Pending consolidation with approved_with_restrictions in v1.1.

efsa_statuses.name: Restricted in EU
efsa_statuses.notes: Substance is restricted under EU regulation — limited use cases or specific authorization required.

efsa_statuses.name: Banned in EU
efsa_statuses.notes: Substance is prohibited for use in supplements or food in the EU per EFSA recommendation.

efsa_statuses.name: Not authorised in EU
efsa_statuses.notes: Substance has not received EU authorization for use in the relevant product category. Distinct from banned (which implies prior denial).

efsa_statuses.name: Monitored as contaminant
efsa_statuses.notes: EFSA monitors this substance as a potential contaminant rather than as a deliberately added ingredient.

efsa_statuses.name: Under EFSA review
efsa_statuses.notes: EFSA review of this substance is ongoing; status may change as the assessment is completed.

efsa_statuses.name: Food ingredient (no supplement assessment)
efsa_statuses.notes: Substance is recognized as a food ingredient under EU food law but has no separate dietary-supplement assessment.

efsa_statuses.name: Extraction solvent (regulated)
efsa_statuses.notes: Substance is regulated as an extraction solvent under EU food-processing rules; not a final-product ingredient.
